articles.title: Why Did MRVL, AVGO, HPE Stocks Climb To 52-Week Highs Today? - Yahoo Finance
articles.description: Marvell Technology, Broadcom, and Hewlett Packard Enterprise all soared on Tuesday, gaining from the ongoing AI rally.
articles.content:
• MRVL stock soared to an all-time intraday high after Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang called it the next trillion-dollar company at the Computex conference in Taipei, Taiwan.
